allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Remove-Item -Path ''D:/me'' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path ''D:/dexp'' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; echo ''Removed junctions''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "if \(-not \(Test-Path ''D:/mea''\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path ''D:/mea'' -Force | Out-Null }; robocopy ''D:/repos/test/expomoti/create-magic-expo-app'' ''D:/mea'' /E /XD node_modules .git packages/app/android/.gradle packages/app/android/build packages/app/android/app/build packages/app/android/.cxx packages/app/android/app/.cxx /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path ''D:/app-dev'' -Force | Out-Null; robocopy ''D:/mea'' ''D:/app-dev'' /E /XD node_modules .git packages/app/android/.gradle packages/app/android/build packages/app/android/app/build packages/app/android/.cxx packages/app/android/app/.cxx /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS")

hooks.command: bun run -F @magic-expo/app doctor && bun run -F @magic-expo/app expo:check

hooks.prompt: Validate your implementation, run `bun run lint` and `bun run typecheck`and rethink the prompt from the user and check the the implemented features
